entries.description:
Turn your TV into your own personal art gallery. Use this video as a screensaver / wallpaper and instantly create pleasant and relaxing atmosphere in your home, office, or public space. 

This 3-hour series features high resolution woodblock prints from artists like Utagawa Hiroshige (1797-1858), Katsushika Hokusai (1760-1849), Utagawa Kuniyoshi (1798-1861), and more. Most of this artwork was created between 1800-1850. No sound, just beautiful HD artwork. 

All artwork is in the public domain, and is offered free and unrestricted under Creative Commons Zero (CC0) designation. 

If you like this video, please subscribe, comment, or like and I will make more of them!

entries.title: Meditative HD Fine Art Screensaver for TV - Japanese Prints

entries.description:
Transform your television into a stunning art display with this four-hour art screensaver designed for flat screens. The slideshow features 80 renowned paintings, each showcased for 3 minutes in silence. Ideal for enhancing the ambiance of parties, complementing interior design, or simply for personal enjoyment. At the start of each painting, catch a glimpse of the title and artist's name for a few seconds. Timestamps throughout the video also provide this information. To minimize the risk of burn-in on your TV, the artwork subtly zooms. Appreciate your viewing experience!
